g.text: Excalidraw interpretation of the README workflow: AI prepares, humans approve, Azure artifacts flow forward.
Conductor presents both to the user before architecture starts.
Architect evaluates WAF tradeoffs and cost posture.
The Bicep or Terraform planner creates the implementation plan.
The governance-discovery-subagent pulls Azure Policy constraints.
Outputs: 04-plan.md, governance constraints, and challenge findings.
IaC codegen produces AVM-first templates in infra/bicep/{project}
or infra/terraform/{project}. Validation either passes for approval
or loops back for revision with feedback.
Deploy executes only after a what-if or terraform plan preview.
The user verifies the live deployment before the workflow continues.
As-Built reads prior artifacts and deployed resource state.
It produces the 07-*.md documentation suite for workload handoff.
The workflow closes with human-governed documentation delivery.
AI orchestrated. Human governed. Azure ready.
